summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MANO new features (Iteration 5). Backend: 24/27 tests passed (89%). Frontend: All pages load correctly. PDF generation failing due to WeasyPrint library dependency issue.

critical.issue: PDF generation fails with 500 error - WeasyPrint cannot import external libraries
critical.error_message: WeasyPrint could not import some external libraries
critical.fix: Install WeasyPrint system dependencies: apt-get install libpango-1.0-0 libpangocairo-1.0-0 libgdk-pixbuf2.0-0 libffi-dev shared-mime-info

issues: Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - React state update issue in BrowserRouter/Login

passed_tests: GET /api/enterprise/dashboard - Returns metrics with summary, risk_distribution, departments, trend_data
GET /api/family/dashboard - Returns members, alerts, stats, has_family_plan
POST /api/family/members - Adds senior family member with simplified_mode
GET /api/admin/dashboard - Returns stats with total_users, premium_users, pending_investors, approved_investors, total_revenue
GET /api/admin/investors - Returns list of investor requests
GET /api/notifications - Returns notifications list with unread_count
POST /api/notifications/subscribe - Successfully subscribes to push notifications
Frontend: Enterprise Dashboard page loads with metrics, departments, trend chart
Frontend: Family Admin page loads with members list, add member dialog
Frontend: Admin Panel loads with stats, investor requests, tabs for users/payments/downloads
failed_tests: GET /api/investor/download-pdf/invalid-document - Returns 500 instead of 404 (WeasyPrint import fails before validation)
action_items: HIGH: Install WeasyPrint system dependencies to fix PDF generation: apt-get install libpango-1.0-0 libpangocairo-1.0-0 libgdk-pixbuf2.0-0 libffi-dev shared-mime-info
LOW: Fix React state update warning in Login component - setState called during render
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation endpoint imports weasyprint at function level which fails if dependencies missing - consider adding try/catch with helpful error message
The /api/investor/download-pdf endpoint should validate doc_type before importing weasyprint to return proper 404 for invalid documents
seed_data_creation: Test users created: test@mano.com/TestPass123, admin@mano.com/AdminPass123. Family members created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: Enterprise Dashboard (/enterprise), Family Admin (/family-admin), Admin Panel (/admin). PDF generation requires WeasyPrint system dependencies. Admin user created via POST /api/admin/create-admin endpoint. Authentication uses httponly cookies. All new endpoints require authentication, admin endpoints require admin role.
